title: NERV vs SEELE vs
wikitext:
[]: NERV vs. SEELE vs.....             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Tue Jul 21, 2009 1:19 pm ...IPEA? You know, I keep seeing things like "SEELE makes the rules, SEELE is behind everything, Mari works for SEELE, SEELE is responsible for the Vatican Treaty,..." - is really no one considering the possibility of a third faction, an Anti-SEELE group? We kinda had it with "the government" Kaji is(was?) working for, but in the end they were only represented by the cat lady in the series who was only there for Kaji to discuss NERV/SEELE's secrets with. So Rebuild's variant (as with pretty much all Rebuild variants -_-) could be something of a much larger scale, who actually act too. Mari's a big point in this: If she'd be working for SEELE, why bother dropping her off "covertly" instead of sending her officially? She could roam NERV more or less freely then, and she apparently is an official NERV pilot anyway, just from a different base, so why so secret? It might get some "but we don't even have an EVA for her" remarks, or they'd have to consider putting *gasp* her into EVA-03, but I don't really think the DSS were that detailed anyway that they could have known that they'd have to keep her away from NERV's eyes long enough as to not to risk her against (or rather in) Bardiel. It wouldn't necessarily be the IPEA, but it'd kinda make sense. Why bother bringing them up anyway (other maybe as red herring/the need to name everything)? It could have worked even without "them" having a specified name. Also, it could somewhat work as explanation as to how Mari could hijack EVA-02, still under IPEA control. As for their goals, whether they'd want to prevent an impact or also want one of their own or if it's "ZOMG SEQUAL!" and it was founded by remembering people to work directly against SEELE - that'd be even more fanwanking than the entire idea, I guess...

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Tue Jul 21, 2009 1:23 pm I would certainly think that Kaji is a triple agent. Working with a group to bring Seele down. As for Mari, she could have plans of her own for all we know, Seele seems to be just as dickheaded as before so who wouldnt want their chunk outta them?

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Tue Jul 21, 2009 1:42 pm A transparent third party that has little to nothing to do with Evangelion development wouldn't have a chance in hell to pass something as drastic as the Vatican Treaty without SEELE and NERV simultaneously going "hahaha **** off." It just too obviously muddles in everyone else's plans and perceptions of the Angel war. If they had that kind of creative control, ... you could never realistically portray them as a transparent third party.

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Tue Jul 21, 2009 2:26 pm I'm sorry, but who is IPEA? I like this idea. If we assume that there will be another Nerv vs. SEELE battle in either 3.0 or 4.0, it would be more exciting to see some other group pulling the strings to try and take SEELE down before they can complete their plans.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jul 21, 2009 2:29 pm It was what was written on the floor of that room where Eva-02 was put away. Thus implying that it has something to do with the treaty.

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Tue Jul 21, 2009 2:29 pm I do remember a reviewer mentioning other logos of organizations from the second movie. Besides the one that JimmyWolk mentioned, I remember there being one called Acron (or something like that). It is a possibility that there is another fraction out there that Mari or Kaji are apart of (For all we know they could be working together).

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Jul 21, 2009 2:32 pm If there are then these organizations will exist for no reason other than to give the fans a million more things to talk about.

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Tue Jul 21, 2009 2:36 pm I Accidentally Dracula wrote: A transparent third party that has little to nothing to do with Evangelion development wouldn't have a chance in hell to pass something as drastic as the Vatican Treaty without SEELE and NERV simultaneously going "hahaha **** off." It just too obviously muddles in everyone else's plans and perceptions of the Angel war. If they had that kind of creative control, ... you could never realistically portray them as a transparent third party.

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Tue Jul 21, 2009 2:36 pm Ornette wrote: It was what was written on the floor of that room where Eva-02 was put away. Thus implying that it has something to do with the treaty.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Tue Jul 21, 2009 2:51 pm The Goose wrote: Besides the one that JimmyWolk mentioned, I remember there being one called Acron (or something like that).

[]:             Quote Post by Soul Fire » Tue Jul 21, 2009 4:38 pm Anyhow I dont think Mari is an agent of SEELE. It is a bit FAR fetched in my mind. Im sure she was talking to Kaji whilst in unit 5 aswell. There was a voice that sounded like his talking to her for a small while starting at 00:01:03. If she knows Kaji and is somehow affiliated with him then I dont think she could be working with SEELE. Kaji is a good guy after all.

[]:             Quote Post by xeon » Tue Jul 21, 2009 5:09 pm Marduk Agency

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Tue Jul 21, 2009 8:21 pm MugwumpHasNoLiver wrote: Did you actually see a logo or just heard that blurted out? Because I remember hearing something about Acheron blurted out in the opening battle with Mari. Of course, Acheron in a river in hell, and since the original series already had levels of Central Dogma is named after places from Dante's Inferno, I just thought it carried over.

[]:             Quote Post by Lagann » Tue Jul 21, 2009 9:31 pm Heres the best shot icould get of the IPEA logo [URL=http://img521.imageshack.us/i/vlcsnap24627.png/] [/URL] At the beginning of the movie they keep saying that they must not let the 3rd angel get to acron.And did anyone else notice that eva 05 had no AT field whatsoever.

[]:             Quote Post by Cypher » Tue Jul 21, 2009 9:36 pm I dont think the IPEA will play much of a roll in whats to come I believe the organization is just another branch of the UN that was developed as a neutral third party to look after the sealed Evangelions. This is because their logo is just a variation of the UN logo but with an Eva on it and when unit 02 is being lowered into the pit on the side of the wall it says "UN IPEA". Also the fact that Mari was able to take Unit 02 from the IPEA was probably because Japan no longer had 3 Eva's after Unit 03's destruction and not to mention they had no other pilot.

[]:             Quote Post by Soul Fire » Tue Jul 21, 2009 9:47 pm Laggan : Unit 05 does have an AT field I believe as Im sure we hear Mari saying something to do with her field being at maximum strenth just after she is singing that song in Unit 5 ....ummm at around 00:02:35.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jul 21, 2009 11:56 pm http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/IPEA Wiki tells me nothing, I doubt it's either of those. >_>

[]:             Quote Post by catinajar » Wed Jul 22, 2009 8:51 am I take it that we have no idea what IPEA stands for? I'm pretty sure it has nothing to do with swedish furniture manufacturers...

[]:             Quote Post by Soul Fire » Wed Jul 22, 2009 8:59 am I take it that we have no idea what IPEA stands for? I'm pretty sure it has nothing to do with swedish furniture manufacturers...

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Wed Jul 22, 2009 10:07 am No doubt there.
